chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-74 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on CMA 249/24 2.For orders on CMA 250/24 3.For hearing of main case 25-10-2024 None present for the petitioners. **** None present for the petitioners; no intimation is received so far. However, petitioners have filed this petition for providing them protection, whereas perusal of record reflects that earlier petitioners had approached Justice of Peace, where such protection was provided to them vide order dated 03.03.2024. Under such circumstances, this petition being not maintainable is hereby dismissed along with listed applications. JUDGE Ahmad
